name: soybean
summary: Mechanism context: isoflavone estrogen-receptor modulation, lipid metabolism and bone-turnover signaling, antioxidant pathways. Safety: Caution in hormone-sensitive conditions and with thyroid medication timing; allergy possible.. Interactions tracked: May affect levothyroxine absorption timing, review with hormone therapies and anticoagulants if diet changes are large..

preparation: Whole soy foods, protein isolate, isoflavone extracts; fermented/nonfermented forms differ.
